metadata.thoughts:
**Evaluating strike details**

It looks like I'm processing information about a 24-hour strike scheduled for December 12, 2025. There are guaranteed service windows from 05:30 to 08:30 and 16:30 to 19:30. I need to format the start and end dates in 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss', so I'll set the start date to 2025-12-12 00:00:00 and the end date to 2025-12-12 23:59:59. I've got to ensure I've captured all this correctly!
